data.title: Cloud-based Infrastructure
data.description: Adobe utilizes a robust cloud infrastructure to deliver its suite of products and services.
data.technical_spec: Adobe Experience Cloud with AWS and Microsoft Azure integrations.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Adobe's modular setup increases scalability and maintainability of services.

data.title: Redundant Data Systems
data.description: Provides redundancy and failover capabilities to ensure high availability.
data.technical_spec: Geographically distributed data centers with load balancing.

data.title: CI/CD Pipelines
data.description: Efficient deployment and integration processes to ensure rapid, reliable updates.
data.technical_spec: Jenkins, GitLab CI, and automated testing frameworks.

data.title: APIs and SDKs
data.description: Extensive set of APIs and SDKs available for developers to build on Adobe's platform.
